title: Poop Highlights 2007 - 2009
description:
Holy cow, it's over 10 minutes of clips from almost all the YouTube Poops I've uploaded so far! Stretching right back from the early cd-i poops to the more recent Rosie & Jim / Ricky era, this massive compilation contains all the funniest bits from over 30 different poops I've created. Which clip is your favourite?

The quality is quite poor on a lot of the clips here, but that's just the way they were to begin with. You might not agree that some of the clips I've chosen are the best, but you can still watch all of the original poops in their entirety, it's not like I'm gonna get rid of them or anything (although some were taken offline earlier). And those early cd-i ones really aren't that good, I don't know why they still get favoured over the recent poops. I haven't included any DIE songs except for the brief bit in the opening, because there's so many of them and I don't like to put them in the same category as my standard poops.

I'll be making some brand new poops when I have time, probably soon. In the meantime, I hope you enjoy this collection (if you can stomach it for the entire 10 minutes...)
